title: Monetary policy decisions - ECB Navigation Page
summary: This source is an ECB website navigation/menu page for monetary policy decisions, not the actual policy decision content. The page lists available sections including press releases, statements, and Q&A transcripts, but contains no specific monetary policy decisions, interest rate changes, or policy actions. A reference date of March 19, 2026 appears in the source, suggesting future meeting content, but no substantive policy information is provided.
key_points: This is a navigation page structure, not actual monetary policy decision content
No specific interest rate decisions, QE announcements, or policy changes are stated
References indicate ECB publishes decisions at 14:15 CET on Governing Council meeting days
Page lists various monetary policy tools (TLTRO, asset purchase programs) without specific current decisions
Bulgaria eurozone accession in 2026 mentioned as context
Source is primarily site navigation architecture rather than policy documentation
why_it_matters: This source cannot be used for market research or macro catalyst analysis as it contains no actual monetary policy decisions. It only provides access points to policy content that must be retrieved separately from linked pages or press releases.
macro_context: ECB monetary policy is a primary macro catalyst for eurozone markets. However, this source provides no specific policy content to analyze for macro impact.
notes: LOW QUALITY SOURCE - This is a website navigation/menu page that does not contain actual monetary policy decisions. To extract meaningful macro catalyst information, the actual press release or policy statement pages (referenced as linked content) would need to be retrieved. The source structure indicates decisions are published at 14:15 CET on Governing Council meeting days, but no specific decisions are visible in this content. Consider this a placeholder requiring the actual policy document.
